mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, created_at FROM role WHERE name = #{name} LIMIT 1

SELECT p.module AS module, p.id AS permissionId, p.code AS code, p.name AS name, p.description AS description, CASE WHEN rp.id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS selected FROM permission p LEFT JOIN role_permission rp ON rp.permission_id = p.id AND rp.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY p.module ASC, p.code ASC, p.name ASC
